summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Plan Pilot Mobile web preview. All 14 features tested successfully - login screen, sign-in flow, Daily Plan screen with all components, energy selector interaction, expandable sections, tab navigation, Ollie Chat screen with messaging, Settings screen, and sign-out flow. Forest Green brand colors (#5d8a66, #4a6e52) are properly applied throughout the UI.
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper separation of concerns
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
Forest Green brand colors are consistently applied via Colors.ts
AuthProvider properly handles session state with Supabase
Mobile app uses SecureStore for secure token storage
Web preview uses MOCKED data for Daily Plan, tasks, and schedule blocks - this is expected for demo purposes
seed_data_creation: None - web preview uses mock data
context_for_next_testing_agent: Web preview at https://426e23e8-4b46-4390-b407-5f42b2abf39c.preview.emergentagent.com is fully functional. All data-testid attributes are present. The actual Expo mobile code in /app/apps/mobile/ connects to real Supabase. The web preview uses mock/static data for demonstration.

sign_in_flow.notes: Sign in button navigates to Daily Plan screen

energy_selector.notes: LOW/MEDIUM/HIGH pills are interactive and change selection

chat_interaction.notes: Input accepts text, send button works, messages display correctly

sign_out_flow.notes: Sign out returns to login screen

data_testid_attributes.notes: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes

phone_frame.notes: Phone frame renders with notch and correct styling (390x844 dimensions)

forest_green_colors.notes: Brand colors #5d8a66 and #4a6e52 are used throughout the design

mocked_apis_note: MOCKED: The web preview uses mock/static data for Daily Plan schedule blocks, tasks, and chat responses. The actual Expo native code connects to real Supabase (https://wuzignwkynhquevywbyd.supabase.co) for data.
